steps.description: Buy napa cabbage, salt, garlic, ginger, gochugaru
Get feedback from a Korean cuisine expert
Take a selfie with your kimchi
Get rice cakes, fish cakes, gochujang
Pool money for ingredients (Pula per person)
Get feedback from a dance mentor
Take a photo of your practice space
Read one chapter on positive discipline
Share experience with a parenting group
Photo of the jar with notes
Agree on one new rule together
Take a sleepy selfie with child
Upload a photo of your bridge
Set up long jump, shot put, javelin stations
Teams of 3, shuttle run to net
